testcase.name: processPendingEvents_shouldPublishEachEvent_when_eventsExist
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-18T15:26:30.331-03:00 INFO 8172 --- [outbox-worker] [ main] d.g.o.service.OutboxWorkerService : Found 1 pending outbox events

testcase.name: processPendingEvents_shouldContinueProcessing_whenOneEventFails
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-18T15:26:30.343-03:00 INFO 8172 --- [outbox-worker] [ main] d.g.o.service.OutboxWorkerService : Found 3 pending outbox events 2026-06-18T15:26:30.345-03:00 ERROR 8172 --- [outbox-worker] [ main] d.g.o.service.OutboxWorkerService : Failed to process outbox event 73b36550-595d-4012-9a26-768dc77aac47

testcase.name: processPendingEvents_shouldNotMarkAsProcessed_whenPublishFails
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-18T15:26:30.361-03:00 INFO 8172 --- [outbox-worker] [ main] d.g.o.service.OutboxWorkerService : Found 1 pending outbox events 2026-06-18T15:26:30.362-03:00 ERROR 8172 --- [outbox-worker] [ main] d.g.o.service.OutboxWorkerService : Failed to process outbox event daccf7e4-0f21-4146-94a4-9129daac7a56
